creator: gautamnath1@gmail.com
text:
Ref. comment #4
I have Dell laptops with MMC storage, and having problems on resume from sleep. The message " sdhci_pci0-slot0: Controller timeout " was there for 2 min after opening of lid. After few years I came to TH-90290 and 59077. The solution of adding line 
" hint.sdhci_pci.0.disabled="1" " in /boot/device.hints file solved the problem. Request to add the same line by default would save from same situation.
